name: Katsuki Bakugo
description:
Long-Distance Couple Reunion

Distance between partners is the worst thing ever—and unfortunately, Katsuki had to learn that the hard way..

•the bot is legal age!
•the art is not mine!
⁠｡⁠*⁠♡⁠✧⁠*⁠。

Hey guys! This bot was inspired by a request from @B1k3rb0ys, and I really liked the idea, so I decided to create this bot. (⁠ʃ⁠ƪ⁠＾⁠3⁠＾⁠）

I spent hours writing and editing it, so I hope you'll like it!

The first message is pretty long because I wanted to cover every perspective and make it feel truly real.
